channel.title: Travel Japan on Voylin's Life
channel.description: Recent content in Travel Japan on Voylin's Life

item.title: First trip to Japan
item.description: Departure to Japan February 2016, my first trip to Japan!! I was so excited to finally go to this country, but what made me decide to go to this country is something I haven’t told many people about yet. I was actually planning on going with a friend, but those plans got canceled soon after I bought my plane ticket. Kind of disappointed but as I’m no stranger to solo traveling I decided to still go instead of canceling my plane ticket.
